在 ColaOS 发布之后，很多都人问我：
为什么做操作系统？这是不是太大了？

其实我之前就提到过一篇对我影响很大的文章，Garry Tan 的那篇 Boil the Ocean。
以前俗话说 don't boil the ocean，专注一个小点切入。
他说今天不一样了，技术成本是零，大家都有核弹了。

做操作系统的第二个原因是我最近看完了左晖的那边《详谈》，非常有名的一本书
看完之后我最大的收获，是一句令我醍醐灌顶的话：
左晖每次做事情的时候，都是选择做大事
原因是做一件小事和做一件大事，对于一个创始人来说
你需要投入的时间和努力是一样的。
因为你所以的时间和精力都 all in 了嘛。
RT @oran_ge: https://t.co/mJl6PmsKpC
很多人的「知道」，是一团从未被展开过的模糊感觉。

I love surreal art by this creator

I'm really impressed by the Grok Imagine upgrade.

There's a new "quality" mode where your images take (slightly) longer to generate, but the results are shockingly good.

I've been testing it for the last few days - a couple things to try 👇 https://t.co/OuNLRPTCow

(1) Text rendering

This model is a major improvement when it comes to rendering long-form text.

It can take text that you provide (like I did for the cake), or write its own "script" - in the second image, I just asked for a whiteboard decoding Gen Z slang 🤯 https://t.co/wmYK0gi3jY

(2) World creation

The model is exceptionally good at taking relatively simple prompts and creating a detailed environment.

For these images, I gave prompts like "anime shot inside a16z office" or "video game of SF."

It added all the details - like the sign in the office or https://t.co/HwIXp0gsKz

(3) Food photography

This is weirdly tricky one for models to do - I think it's easy for AI food to look "fake."

Grok does quite well with this, again with simple prompts (e.g. "gooey chocolate chip cookie with sea salt"). https://t.co/UtzvG0RZFY

(4) Infographics

It's tough for models to render graphics AND text correctly - Grok does an admirable job.

For the box office stats, I gave it numbers and asked to add images.

Or you can ask for something like “infographic of how tattoos work.”

(open these to see more) https://t.co/Y61dTGgnDb

(5) Anime

Grok has always been quite good at anime, but this update is next level.

It's great at character shots, action shots, and scenery - and quite steerable in terms of the style or aesthetic you want. https://t.co/5NcIZX2uOt

Would highly recommend updating your @grok app to try the new model or using the website on desktop.

Excited to get editing + reference images later because I suspect this will be a great model for product photography.

These were made with just text prompts 😲 https://t.co/O0jR8Vg8zM

沉寂许久的Pika 搞了个新东西

不是视频生成，是帮你造一个"AI 分身"

上传自拍、录制你的声音、回答性格问题，就能生出一个有你的脸、你的声音、你的说话习惯的 AI Self。

然后它可以：

→ 接管你 16 个平台的通讯（Slack、WhatsApp、Instagram、LinkedIn…） → 用你的风格发内容、回消息 

→ https://t.co/7NEEcI7MdK

实时视频通话

这是最硬核的能力。你的 AI Self 可以以你的面孔和声音，实时参加 Google Meet 视频会议。

不是播放预录视频，是真的实时对话，有表情、有口型同步、有自然手势，延迟只有 1.5 秒，还会后自动生成会议笔记。

通过Pika 发布的 pikastream-video-meeting skill实现... https://t.co/arLHXu66L5

不过价格还是挺贵的收费 $0.5/分钟。

通过这个 Skill 你还可以将你的分身给 Claude Code、OpenClaw 等 AI Agent 使用...

详细介绍：https://t.co/oRfhdHeQew
